---
layout: cv
title: Sid S.'s CV
---
# Sid S.
CS Student

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="ski25006@byui.edu">ski25006@byui.edu</a>
<!-- | <a href="https://github.com/skinner055">Download PDF</a> -->
| <a href="https://github.com/byuidatascience/datascience_portfolio/blob/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
</div>


## Currently

Working on a PhD in Computer Science

### Specialized in

Software Development


### Research interests

C# & Python


## Education

`2025-2026`
__BYUI__



## Awards

`NA`
NA


## Publications

<!-- A list is also available [online](http://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=LTOTl0YAAAAJ) -->

### Journals

`NA`
NA

### Patents

`NA`
NA


## Occupation

`2025`
__Video Media Department__, Idaho

- Worked backend setting up projects
- Worked in production assisting with projects and shoots



<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: July 2026 -->
